items.headline: P.K. Subban's bond with Montreal still solid in 2026 playoff run
items.description:
MONTREAL -- Retired defenseman P.K. Subban was back in his first NHL home over the weekend, in a suite at raucous Bell Centre for Games 3 and 4 of the Eastern Conference First Round between the Montreal Canadiens and Tampa Bay Lightning.
With a few days off between studio assignments

items.headline: Fantasy hockey picks props projections for 2025-26 season
items.description: NHL.com identifies players to watch for free-to-play fantasy hockey games, props and futures throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. For more coverage, visit NHL.com/Fantasy.

items.headline: Edmonton Oilers pushed to brink, running out of time to find another level
items.description: ANAHEIM -- The Edmonton Oilers are in a familiar position, sitting in a hole in the Stanley Cup Playoffs and needing a monumental effort to climb out.

items.headline: Edmonton Oilers Anaheim Ducks game 4 recap April 26 2026
items.description: ANAHEIM -- Ryan Poehling scored at 2:29 of overtime to give the Anaheim Ducks a 4-3 win against the Edmonton Oilers in Game 4 of the Western Conference First Round at Honda Center on Sunday.

items.headline: Brandon Hagel provides spark in Lightning Game 4 rally
items.description: MONTREAL -- Brandon Hagel looked up at the raucous Bell Centre crowd that was showering him with boos and broke into a mischievous smile.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning Montreal Canadiens Game 4 recap April 26 2026
items.description: MONTREAL -- Brandon Hagel scored twice in the third period, and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied for a 3-2 win against the Montreal Canadiens in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Bell Centre on Sunday.

items.headline: Color of Hockey: Sunny Mehta's hiring as New Jersey GM 'historic'
items.description: William Douglas has been writing The Color of Hockey blog since 2012. Douglas joined NHL.com in 2019 and writes about people of color in the sport. Today, he profiles the reaction within the South Asian hockey community to the New Jersey Devils hiring Sunny Mehta as their new general manager.

items.headline: Anze Kopitar’s NHL career ends on bittersweet note with Kings playoff exit
items.description: LOS ANGELES -- Anze Kopitar skated to center ice and took a deep breath. As he waved, his Los Angeles Kings teammates circled him, tapping their sticks in his honor, and the fans at Crypto.com Arena gave him a standing ovation.

items.headline: Colorado Avalanche Los Angeles Kings game 4 recap April 26 2026
items.description: LOS ANGELES -- Nathan MacKinnon had two goals and an assist, and the Colorado Avalanche completed a sweep of the Los Angeles Kings with a 5-1 win in Game 4 of the Western Conference First Round at Crypto.com Arena on Sunday.

items.headline: Edmonton Oilers have not decided on Game 4 starting goalie
items.description:
ANAHEIM -- The Edmonton Oilers made a goalie change for Game 4 of the Western Conference First Round against the Anaheim Ducks at Honda Center on Sunday.
Tristan Jarry got the call ahead of Connor Ingram, who started the first three games of the best-of-7 series, which Anaheim leads 2-1.

items.description:

items.headline: Anze Kopitar Kings applaud career retirement
items.description:
Anze Kopitar has been a King his entire NHL life, so on what is expected to be his final NHL game, he received a sendoff fit for one.

items.headline: Montreal Canadiens Serve Savard lights the torch Game 4
items.description:
The crowd in Montreal was already hyped up, then Serge Savard made an appearance and pandemonium ensued.

items.headline: Colorado Avalanche Dallas Stars Minnesota Wild 2026 playoff lookahead
items.description:
The Colorado Avalanche will play the Dallas Stars or Minnesota Wild in the Western Conference Second Round.
The Avalanche advanced by defeating the Los Angeles Kings 5-1 in Game 4 at Crypto.com Arena on Sunday.
